items.title: Up to 150 ex-WHSmith High Street stores to close as rescue deal approved
items.summary: The sweeping restructuring, approved by a court, will see steep rent cuts on most remaining stores.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: JPC likely to retain clause on removal of Ministers after 30-days in custody
items.summary: Draft report on 130th Constitution Amendment Bill expected by July 10; panel to finalise recommendations before Monsoon Session

items.title: Catholic Group Consecrates 4 Bishops, Risking Break With Vatican
items.summary: The traditionalist Society of St. Pius X went ahead with the ceremony, even after the Vatican warned it would result in the bishops’ excommunication.
